title: taraxacum macromerum
intro: Taraxacum macromerum, also known as large dandelion or greater dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family, closely related to the common dandelion (Taraxacum officinale). The medicinal properties of Taraxacum macromerum include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its ability to support liver and kidney function. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum macromerum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
